title: LIMEN Evidence Envelope Schema
description: Schema for validating evidence envelope records generated by the LIMEN attestation pipeline.

claim_id.description: Stable identifier for the claim linked to evidence.

source_id.description: Identifier of the raw source (e.g., regulation notice ID).

jurisdiction.description: ISO country code or equivalent jurisdiction tag.

language.description: Language code of the source material.

translation_confidence.description: Confidence level of any translation performed.

c2pa_reference.description: C2PA manifest identifier that captures provenance of the source document.

timestamp.description: ISO‑8601 timestamp when the evidence role was recorded.

receipt_id.description: Identifier of the SCITT/Transparency receipt linking the testimony to the anchor.
